---
title: "Graphical Proof: Rationale Dosing Based on Body Size"
author: "Ryan Crass"
format: html
editor: source
---

## Running Code

Set up Enivronment

```{r }
library(conflicted)
library(tidyverse)
conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("lag", "dplyr")

```


```{r temp}
#####Load Packages#####
options(scipen=999)
library(tidyverse)


##Functions
wt_allo <- function(wt, alpha = 1){
  alpha*wt^0.75
}


##Weight Range
data <- data.frame(wt = 1:300) #Feasible weights across lifespan and demographic variation
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(mgperkg = 1*wt, 
         allometric = wt_allo(wt))

##Predictions
```
